Description: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid username: Admin
2. Enter valid password: admin123
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to Dashboard page

Description: Verify login fails with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid username
2. Enter invalid password
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error alert displays 'Invalid credentials' and user remains on login page

Description: Verify error message for valid username and wrong password
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: Admin
2. Enter wrong password
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error alert displays 'Invalid credentials'

Description: Verify password field masks input characters
Test Steps: 1. Check input tag type attribute of password field
Expected Result: Attribute type equals 'password' representing hidden chars

Description: Verify all login page UI elements are visible
Test Steps:
1. Verify logo image
2. Verify Login header title
3. Verify form input fields and button
4. Verify forgot password link
5. Verify copyright text
Expected Result: All specified login page elements are visible and properly rendered

Description: Verify credential hint box displays default login info
Test Steps: 1. Inspect the credential hint card above login form
Expected Result: Hint box displays 'Username : Admin' and 'Password : admin123'

Description: Verify login page title contains OrangeHRM
Test Steps: 1. Read browser page title
Expected Result: Page title contains 'OrangeHRM'

Description: Verify login page URL contains auth/login
Test Steps: 1. Check current page URL
Expected Result: URL contains '/auth/login'

Description: Verify input placeholders display correct text
Test Steps:
1. Read placeholder attribute of Username input
2. Read placeholder attribute of Password input
Expected Result: Username placeholder is 'Username' and Password placeholder is 'Password'

Description: Verify logout functionality redirects to login page
Test Steps:
1. Click user profile dropdown
2. Click Logout link
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to login page

Description: Verify dashboard cannot be accessed directly after logout
Test Steps: 1. Navigate directly to dashboard URL /web/index.php/dashboard/index
Expected Result: User is redirected to login page and cannot view dashboard without auth

Description: Verify browser back button does not access dashboard after logout
Test Steps: 1. Press browser back button after logout
Expected Result: User remains on login page and dashboard is not accessible

Description: Verify required field validations when both fields are blank
Test Steps:
1. Leave Username blank
2. Leave Password blank
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: 'Required' validation text is displayed under both inputs

Description: Verify username required validation when only password is entered
Test Steps:
1. Leave Username blank
2. Enter valid password
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: 'Required' validation text is displayed under Username input only

Description: Verify password required validation when only username is entered
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid username
2. Leave Password blank
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: 'Required' validation text is displayed under Password input only

Description: Verify login fails with special characters in credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter script tags as username
2. Enter special characters as password
3. Click Login button
Expected Result: Error alert displays 'Invalid credentials' and no XSS occurs

Description: Verify navigation to Forgot Password page
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Forgot your password?' link
Expected Result: User is navigated to Reset Password page showing username field and reset buttons

Description: Verify cancellation of password reset request
Pre-condition: User is on Forgot Password page
Test Steps: 1. Click Cancel button
Expected Result: User is redirected back to Login page with Login button visible

Description: Verify successful submission of password reset request
Pre-condition: User is on Forgot Password page
Test Steps:
1. Enter username: Admin
2. Click Reset Password button
Expected Result: Success title displays 'Reset Password link sent successfully'

Description: Verify forgot password page heading text
Pre-condition: User is on Forgot Password page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to forgot password page
2. Check heading text
Expected Result: Heading displays 'Reset Password'

Description: Verify dashboard page loads after successful login
Test Steps:
1. Complete login flow
2. Wait for page load
Expected Result: URL contains '/dashboard' and header displays 'Dashboard' text

Description: Verify dashboard widgets are visible
Test Steps: 1. Count visible widgets on the dashboard
Expected Result: Dashboard contains multiple active widgets

Description: Verify Time at Work widget is displayed
Test Steps: 1. Locate Time at Work widget on dashboard
Expected Result: Time at Work widget is visible on screen

Description: Verify My Actions widget is displayed
Test Steps: 1. Locate My Actions widget on dashboard
Expected Result: My Actions widget is visible on screen

Description: Verify Quick Launch widget is displayed
Test Steps: 1. Locate Quick Launch widget on dashboard
Expected Result: Quick Launch widget is visible on screen

Description: Verify sidebar contains all main navigation items
Test Steps: 1. Verify visibility of modules: Admin, PIM, Leave, Time, Recruitment, My Info, Performance, Dashboard, Directory, Maintenance, Claim, Buzz
Expected Result: All 12 module sidebar links are visible on screen

Description: Verify logged-in user name is displayed in header
Test Steps: 1. Inspect the top-right header section
Expected Result: Logged-in user name is visible in top right dropdown area

Description: Verify dropdown menu contains all user options
Test Steps: 1. Click user profile dropdown
Expected Result: Menu displays About, Support, Change Password, and Logout links

Description: Verify sidebar collapse and expand functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click sidebar toggle to collapse
2. Click sidebar toggle to expand
Expected Result: Sidebar collapses and expands correctly

Description: Verify Employees on Leave Today widget is displayed
Test Steps: 1. Locate Employees on Leave Today widget on dashboard
Expected Result: Employees on Leave Today widget is visible on screen

Description: Verify sidebar search filters navigation items
Test Steps: 1. Type "Admin" in sidebar search box
Expected Result: Only Admin-related items are visible in sidebar

Description: Verify dashboard URL contains correct path
Test Steps: 1. Check current page URL after login
Expected Result: URL contains '/dashboard/index'

Description: Verify adding a new employee
Pre-condition: User is logged in PIM module
Test Steps:
1. Click Add Employee button
2. Enter FirstName, LastName, ID
3. Click Save button
Expected Result: Employee is successfully saved and shows up in search results

Description: Verify searching employee details by ID
Pre-condition: User is logged in PIM module
Test Steps:
1. Enter Employee ID in search field
2. Click Search button
Expected Result: Employee record matching ID is displayed in results table

Description: Verify updating employee nickname
Pre-condition: User is logged in PIM module
Test Steps:
1. Click Edit for employee
2. Set Nickname
3. Click Save button
Expected Result: Updated nickname is saved and persists on profile reload

Description: Verify deleting an employee record
Pre-condition: User is logged in PIM module
Test Steps:
1. Locate employee in table
2. Click Delete icon
3. Confirm deletion in popup
Expected Result: Employee is removed from table and search returns no results

Description: Verify search with non-existent employee ID returns no records
Pre-condition: User is logged in PIM module
Test Steps:
1. Enter non-existent Employee ID
2. Click Search button
Expected Result: Table displays 0 rows and no matching records found

Description: Verify PIM Employee List tab loads correctly
Pre-condition: User is logged in PIM module
Test Steps:
1. Click Employee List tab
2. Verify search form elements
Expected Result: Search form with Employee ID input, Search and Reset buttons is visible

Description: Verify adding new admin system user

Test Steps:

2. Select User Role
3. Enter existing employee name
4. Enter unique username, password
5. Click Save button
Expected Result: System user is created and visible in search list

2. Click Search button

Description: Verify user role displays correctly in search results

Description: Verify deleting system user
